## Summary

Describe the change clearly and concisely. Focus on what changed and why.

## Testing

Describe how this change was validated.

- [ ] Relevant tests were added or updated when behavior changed
- [ ] The relevant test suite has been run
- [ ] `pnpm run lint` has been run
- [ ] `pnpm run check-types` has been run
- [ ] `pnpm run build` has been run

## Related Issues

Link any related issues here.

Examples:

- `Closes #123`
- `Fixes #123`
- `Relates to #123`

## Notes for Reviewers

Add any context that will help with review, such as tradeoffs, follow-up work, or areas that deserve extra attention.
